mapper.select:
SELECT vo.id AS orderId, vo.order_no AS orderNo, v.id AS voucherId, s.id AS shopId, s.name AS shopName, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.images, '$[0]')) AS shopImage, v.title, v.sub_title AS subTitle, v.pay_value AS payValue, v.actual_value AS actualValue, vo.status, v.valid_begin_time AS validBeginTime, v.valid_end_time AS validEndTime, vo.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_voucher_order vo INNER JOIN tb_voucher v ON v.id = vo.voucher_id INNER JOIN tb_shop s ON s.id = v.shop_id WHERE vo.user_id = #{userId} AND vo.deleted = 0 AND v.deleted = 0
AND vo.status = 1
AND vo.status = 2
AND vo.status = 1 AND v.valid_end_time < NOW()
AND vo.status IN (1, 2)
ORDER BY vo.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_voucher_order vo INNER JOIN tb_voucher v ON v.id = vo.voucher_id WHERE vo.user_id = #{userId} AND vo.deleted = 0 AND v.deleted = 0
AND vo.status = 1
AND vo.status = 2
AND vo.status = 1 AND v.valid_end_time < NOW()
AND vo.status IN (1, 2)

SELECT s.id AS recordId, s.session_id AS sessionId, s.title, (SELECT LEFT(content, 100) FROM tb_ai_message m WHERE m.session_id = s.session_id AND m.role = 'assistant' ORDER BY m.create_time ASC LIMIT 1) AS preview, (JSON_LENGTH(s.shop_ids) - JSON_LENGTH(REPLACE(s.shop_ids, ',', '')) + 1) AS shopCount, s.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_ai_session s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_ai_session s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted = 0
